body.title: D279 data review: check escalation trend ~2 weeks post-deploy
body.result: D279 data review complete. Bug found and fixed: _topic_from_input extracted 'thread' from '[Thread context...]' prefix → 103/172 this-week escalations mis-tagged. Fix: strip boilerplate prefixes before word selection; add 'your'/'their' to stop words. 3 regression tests added (46 total pass). Data: 172 cloud calls this week vs 44 prev (3.9×, more active use); tier.3.5 dominates (160/172); top real topics: hello/greetings (35), dashboard (6), codebase (4). NARRATIVE_GAP deposit is live and correct (TWM transient). No D279 design changes needed.
body.description: Run escalation_stats, check whether cloud escalation rate on gap-deposited topics trends down. Revisit refractory TTL and gap content if signal is noisy.
